summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of ILTMC member portal with all 6 tabs and authentication flows
passed_tests: Member login flow with math captcha (8 * 5 = 40, 23 - 8 = 15)
Member signup form with all required and optional fields
Dashboard tab - Welcome message, statistics cards, profile summary
Profile tab - Profile picture upload section, Total KM section with Update KM button, RP Sheet Link field
Self Attendance tab - Meetings/Rides/Charity counters, Add Attendance button
Chat tab - Members list, message input area placeholder
Ride Upload tab - File upload section, Select Excel File button
Password tab - Change password form with all required fields
Navigation between all 6 tabs working correctly
User profile display (Demo Member, Phoenix road name, Rubble rank, Member position)
ILTMC branding and styling consistent across all pages

success_percentage.backend: Not tested (frontend only testing as requested)
